description: This video introduces the basics of writing a Solana program, focusing on transaction structure and the use of Rust in the Solana Playground IDE. It covers program IDs, accounts, instruction data, and deploying a program to Devnet.
topic_summary: Learn how to write your first Solana program, including transaction structure and deployment using Rust in the Solana Playground IDE. Key concepts include program IDs, accounts, and instruction data [t=1:92].
